# Bootstrap, robustness, M-estimator

## Review{-}

- Delta method
- Asymptotic evaluations of point estimator (MLE)
  - Consistency
  - Efficiency
  - ARE: asymptotic relative efficiency (pp.473~)
- Loss function
- Counting (pp.14~16)

## Bootstrap (pp.478~)

- Nonparametric bootstrap
- Parametric bootstrap

## Robustness

- Robust estimator
- Robustness
- Mean and median

### M-estimator

- Huber estimator
- Limiting distribution, ARE of Huber estimator

## Application{-}

- Bootstrap: derive the numerical CI
- [Robust Estimation: Dealing with Outliers and Heavy Tails](https://danielbaissa.com/intro_to_stats/robust-estimation-dealing-with-outliers-and-heavy-tails)
